arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk uses just one word to describe Arsenal’s William Saliba as a player
arts.sum: Virgil van Dijk and William Saliba are becoming serious rivals in the Premier League right now. Van Dijk and Saliba are constantly compared to one...

arts.ttl: Breaking Mikel Arteta confirms Arsenal defender 'ready' to make injury return vs Monaco
arts.sum: "Yeah he's ready and training really well and he's going to have an opportunity for sure the way the team is looking at the moment," Arteta said on Tuesday when asked about Tierney. Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta has confirmed that Kieran Tierney is ready to make his long-awaited return from injury for the Champions League clash against Monaco.

arts.ttl: Arsenal's key reason for adding axed Man Utd chief Dan Ashworth on shortlist to replace Edu
arts.sum: Both Arsenal and Manchester United are without sporting directors following the respective exits of Edu and Dan Ashworth and the Gunners could potentially move for the latter

arts.ttl: Arsenal eye Dan Ashworth after shock Man Utd exit
arts.sum: Arsenal eye Dan Ashworth after shock Man Utd exit Arsenal are have added Dan Ashworth to their shortlist of potential sporting directors, according to a report.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta confirms full extent of chronic Arsenal injury crisis with 7 missing
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta is set to be without up to seven different Arsenal defenders for Wednesday night's important Champions League clash against Monaco at the Emirates

arts.ttl: Arsenal suffer double training blow before Monaco clash as Mikel Arteta injury crisis worsens
arts.sum: Arsenal duo Thomas Partey and Jurrien Timber both miss Tuesday's training session ahead of Wednesday's Champions League clash with Monaco.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola handed double Man City injury boost as Arsenal and Liverpool watch on in title race
arts.sum: Foden missed City's two matches last week due to bronchitis, while Kovacic had been absent for the last four Premier League games after returning from the international break with an injury. Despite struggling to reach the standards that he set last season for the Blues, Foden has three Champions League goals and an assist so far this season.

arts.ttl: Jurrien Timber injury fear gives Arsenal hardest test of the season
arts.sum: Timber has already missed four other matches this season due to load-bearing issues related to the comeback from his other major injury. Even youngster Myles Lewis-Skelly has only just returned from an injury while Kieran Tierney is yet to play a minute after missing 18 games with a serious hamstring problem and is so far yet to be given any match exposure at senior or youth level because of the frequency of games at the moment combined with the timing of his return.

arts.ttl: Referee Mikel Arteta claims 'destroyed' North London Derby named VAR for Arsenal vs Everton
arts.sum: It is the 16th time Tierney will be the VAR for a game involving the Gunners, a joint-high with Wolverhampton Wanderers, and the fourth instance this season alone. However, one of those was on the only occasion he was assisting Pawson for a game involving the Gunners, their 1-0 home defeat to Leicester in October 2020.

arts.ttl: Arsenal up against Thierry Henry-level challenge as Liverpool title hopes boosted after milestone - Tom Canton
arts.sum: However, the biggest difference between Arsenal and Liverpool this season has been the presence of Mohamed Salah. Arsenal would’ve been thankful to Manchester City’s dip and being two points ahead, but have had that ripped away because of the six-point - potentially nine should the Reds win their game in hand - gap between them and Liverpool.
